[2026] Tournament of Champions Quarters - Peninsula SU vs Harker SSe

Judge: Ari Davidson, Sachin Aggarwal, and Ethan Greer
Decision: Neg 

1AC was Stock Boosted 
1NC was T-Reverse Subsets, No 1AR Theory, New Affs Bad, Aliens Sole Purpose, NFU/Cyber Counterplan, Bioweapons DA
1AR said Sole Purpose Bad
2NR was Bioweapons and NFU/Cyber Counterplan
2AR was Theory + Those Things

I always tried my absolute best in debate to make a positive impact on others. 

If I hadn’t fumbled this 2AR would I have won the whole thing? That’s anyone’s bet. But it also doesn’t matter. There’s a lot of things in life I would do differently if I could but I didn’t so I can’t. Accepting what you’ve done and being willing to have done it all over again - that’s reflection.

April 18 2026
